rule CDB_CVE20264347__MW_WP_Form__510__Unauthenti {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-4347 - MW WP Form <= 5.1.0 - Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Move via mo"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-4347" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-4347 - MW WP Form <= 5.1.0 - Unauthenticated Arbitr"; content:"CVE-2026-4347"; nocase; sid:7226865; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-5322 - AlejandroArciniegas mcp-data-vis MCP server."; content:"CVE-2026-5322"; nocase; sid:8168047; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-5320 - vanna-ai vanna Chat API Endpoint v2 missing "; content:"CVE-2026-5320"; nocase; sid:3719909; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
